title: Building PFZs Monitoring & Fisheries Surveillance System using DTO Technology
description: My M.Sc. research direction focuses on Digital Twin Ocean thinking for potential fishing zone monitoring, fisheries surveillance, ocean data integration and dashboard-supported decision workflows.

title: Potential Marine Protected Areas using MCDM
description: My B.Sc. thesis focused on identifying potential Marine Protected Areas in the coastal region of Bangladesh through a Multi-Criteria Decision Making approach.

title: Target roles: Marine AI, Data Analyst, AI Engineer and DTO Scientist
